LanguageData.AT_hydroheliumion_B.label: Red Burst Line Rifle
LanguageData.AT_hydroheliumion_B.description: It is a weapon developed by Anties to deal with targets with thick armor or strong body itself, such as mechanoids.\n\n Unlike conventional acid weapons, it fires Red Burst, a compound of Anty-acid and Refleum, rather than Anty-acid. Exhibits powerful power.
LanguageData.AT_hydroheliumion_B.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
LanguageData.AT_hydroheliumion_B.tools.0.label: muzzle
